title: P28B record P28 and queue empty
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_path = Path('governance/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
tasks = queue.get('tasks', [])
if not any(t.get('id') == 'P28B' for t in tasks):
    tasks.append({'id':'P28B','title':'Record P28 result and queue empty state','status':'IN_PROGRESS','criteria':'P27B and P28 logged; no PENDING tasks remain; await operator or Claude queue refill','touch_workflows':False})
for task in tasks:
    if task.get('id') == 'P27B':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = '7bf1800b826c8fab8cb3837c0dac89f81eb0a002'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:16:20Z'
    if task.get('id') == 'P28':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = '4a6357f744d861d5cdaa4fa3efec57d1914ce4db'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:17:02Z'
    if task.get('id') == 'P28B':
        task['status'] = 'DONE_PENDING_SHA_RECORD'
queue['tasks'] = tasks
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:19:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'EMPTY_AFTER_P28B_PENDING_ITS_OWN_SHA_RECORD'
queue['next_action'] = 'await operator or Claude to add next ACTIVE_QUEUE tasks; do not invent tasks'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
lines = [json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:16:20Z','id':'P27B','trace_id':'p27b_record_p27_result_queue_log','sha':'7bf1800b826c8fab8cb3837c0dac89f81eb0a002','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False), json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:17:02Z','id':'P28','trace_id':'p28_consolidate_current_queue_status','sha':'4a6357f744d861d5cdaa4fa3efec57d1914ce4db','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)]
for line in lines:
    if line not in existing:
        existing += line + '\n'
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/P28B_RECORD_P28_RESULT_AND_QUEUE_EMPTY.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P28B','trace_id':'p28b_record_p28_result_and_queue_empty','status':'completed','release_pass':True,'recorded_steps':['P27B','P28'],'queue_state':'empty_after_p28b_except_own_sha_record','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'await ACTIVE_QUEUE refill; do not invent tasks'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/P28B_RECORD_P28_RESULT_AND_QUEUE_EMPTY.md')
report.write_text('# P28B | Record P28 result and queue empty\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nRecorded P27B and P28 SHA evidence in ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and execution_log.jsonl. ACTIVE_QUEUE has no PENDING tasks after this step; only P28B own SHA remains to be recorded by a future queue refill/session. Per the three-file protocol, GPT must not invent new tasks when queue is empty.\n\nWorkflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.\n\nNext: await operator or Claude to add next ACTIVE_QUEUE tasks.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
